titleStmt.title: SII 8.537: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 537. (A.R. No. 238 of 1903). ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 49vatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu pañcami- yum budha ṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūrkko
ṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻapu tirumayilāppūr Immaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikrama coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tuṭarmuḷḷināṭṭu Ayanapurattu Ayaṉapuraṅkiḻavaṉ teḷḷiyāṉāṉa ceḻiyataraiyaṉum meṟpaṭi niṉṟanampiyum Iv
viruvom nilavilaipramā ṇam paṇ tta paricāvatu . puliyūrkkoṭṭattil Eḻumūrnāṭṭil teḷḷiyaciṅkanāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa putuppākkattil Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa karainilattilum palarpakkalilum koṇṭuṭaiya nilattilum Ayaṉapuraṅkiḻavaṉ
virakāṅkaiyarāyar Uḷḷuṭṭār Ivvūr kāṇikku Iṟai ṟṟāmal viṭṭuppo yivarkaḷ kāṇikku vanta Iṟaikkum paṭṭiiṟaikkum Iṉakku mekkaparamākayil Ivarkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa Ellaikkum tiruvallikkeṇi Ellaikkumeṟkum
teṉpāṟkellai Ipputuppākkattil capai [ ]ṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellaikkum poṟikku kiḻakku vatikku kāl nilam viṭṭu kiḻakkum Utaiyaṉmaṭṭattukku kiḻaivatikku kiḻakkum Āṇṭamu vatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke
llai pātirikuḻiyil teṉkaṟaikku puvālikku kuṟaikku teṟkum Iṉṉāṟpāṟkellaikkum Uḷḷu Eṟṟac curukkam Uṭpaṭa talaikko pativāramu motta māka Utakam paṇṇi
viṭṭa paṅku Oṉṟu nikki nirnilam nilam nattam paruvarampu laikuṭi perunattam maramum kiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭa tiṟuttināl paṅku Eṟṟaccurukkam Uṭpaṭa ma Eṅkaḷ nila
ttil ṉālpaṅku Oṉṟarai muṉṟum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvata tanta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṟpaṇam 100 2 10- m
Ippaṅku muṉṟum turavukaḷum laipramā ṇamāvatākavum Ippaṅku muṉṟum vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷurakkaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu
ceḻiyataraiyaṉum meṟpaṭi Ippaṅku muṉṟum turavukaḷum tāyatāṉātikaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum Ipramā
mukkālāvatum Ippaṅku mum Uṭpaṭa Ippaṇam nūṟṟeḻu laiyāvatākavum Ipputuppākkam Iṟai
māṭai viḻukkāṭṭukku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka tukku māṭai muṉṟum nāṅkaḷ taṅkaḷukku
ṭāṉ kūṭṭi Iṟaii kavum cammatittu viṟṟu vilaipramā- kkuṭuttom tirumayilāppūr Ūravaṟkku
kku Ivai Ayaṉapuraṅkiḻava raiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai Aya Araiyaṉ niṉṟanampi Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai
Digital edition of SII 8.537 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
